# ⌛  FREE AI Workshop: Last Chance to Build Your Site in 30 Sec!

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-12-31 17:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 435

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Time is running out to join our FREE live workshop!

John Turner, the co-founder of SeedProd will present a live
workshop "Build your website in 30 seconds with AI" on January
8th at 10:30 am EST.

Have you registered yet?

Don't miss out - Save your seat at the FREE workshop today! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.JswSFmeeHODYVpMDAUHPeLiE0OFBiem_lN1zmde0pyk )

Here's a sneak peek of what you'll learn:

* How to use AI Assistant to instantly generate a website layout
* How to easily tweak your AI-generated design without needing
any coding skills
* The secrets of crafting effective prompts to generate
compelling website content
* How to grow your global reach with ChatGPT-assisted
translations and create stunning original images in seconds with
DALL-E 2, right from WordPress

Are you ready to effortlessly build a stunning, custom website
using AI?

👉 Click here to secure your FREE spot before it's too late! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.JswSFmeeHODYVpMDAUHPeLiE0OFBiem_lN1zmde0pyk )

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
